if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND p.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND p.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND p.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND p.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyProp :: selectById */ p.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pt.code_label AS prop_type_cd_nm FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_prop p LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = p.site_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_code cd_pt ON cd_pt.code_grp = 'PROP_TYPE' AND cd_pt.code_value = p.prop_type_cd WHERE p.prop_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyProp :: selectList */ p.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pt.code_label AS prop_type_cd_nm FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_prop p LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = p.site_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_code cd_pt ON cd_pt.code_grp = 'PROP_TYPE' AND cd_pt.code_value = p.prop_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyProp :: selectPageList */ p.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pt.code_label AS prop_type_cd_nm FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_prop p LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = p.site_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_code cd_pt ON cd_pt.code_grp = 'PROP_TYPE' AND cd_pt.code_value = p.prop_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(p.*) /* base.sy :: SyProp :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_prop p
